exploration_notes: The plugin activation validation flows through 4 key files: (1) `src/constants.js` defines `pluginNamePattern` regex `/^(@[\w-]+\/)?nodebb-(theme|plugin|widget|rewards)-[\w-]+$/` — the authoritative pattern for valid plugin identifiers. (2) `src/plugins/install.js` contains the core `Plugins.toggleActive()` method (line 59-79) that validates the plugin ID against `pluginNamePattern` at line 64, rejecting invalid IDs with `[[error:invalid-plugin-id]]`.
